fields.name: Finance Charge Memo No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the finance charge memo number.
The program copies the number from the Finance Charge Memo No. field on the finance charge memo line.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line's number.
The program copies the number from the Line No. field on the finance charge memo line.

fields.name: Attached to Line No.
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line type.

fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the entry number for the customer ledger entry the finance charge memo line was created for.
The program copies the number from the Entry No. field on the finance charge memo line.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date of the customer ledger entry that this finance charge memo line is for.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related document was created.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the due date of the customer ledger entry this finance charge memo line is for.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document type of the customer ledger entry this finance charge memo line is for.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number of the customer ledger entry this finance charge memo line is for.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies an entry description, based on the contents of the Type field.

fields.name: Original Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the original amount of the customer ledger entry that this finance charge memo line is for.

fields.name: Remaining Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the remaining amount of the customer ledger entry this finance charge memo line is for.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount in the currency of the finance charge memo.

fields.name: Interest Rate
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the interest rate that applies to this finance charge memo line.
The program copies the interest rate from the Interest Rate field on the finance charge memo line.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the general product posting group of the general ledger account this finance charge memo line is for.
The program copies the general product posting group from the Gen. Prod. Posting Group field on the finance charge memo line.
The Gen. Prod. Posting Group field is blank if the finance charge memo line does not contain a G/L account entry.

fields.name: VAT %
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the VAT percentage that was used when the line was posted to the general ledger account if the Type field contains G/L Account.
The program copies the VAT % from the VAT % field on the finance charge memo line.

fields.name: VAT Calculation Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies which VAT calculation type was used when VAT was calculated if the Type field contains G/L Account.
The program copies the type from the VAT Calculation Type field on the finance charge memo line.

fields.name: VAT Amount
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the VAT amount that was calculated on the line. This amount is in the currency of the finance charge memo.
The program copies the amount from the VAT Amount field on the finance charge memo line.

fields.name: Tax Group Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the tax group code of the general ledger account this finance charge memo line is for if the Type field contains G/L Account.
The program copies the code from the Tax Group Code.
This field is blank if the issued finance charge memo line does not contain a G/L account entry.

fields.name: VAT Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
If the Type field contains "G/L Account":

This field contains the VAT product posting group of the G/L account this finance charge memo line is for.


The program copies the code from the VAT Prod. Posting Group field on the finance charge memo line when the finance charge memo is issued.


If the Type field contains "Customer Ledger Entry":

This field contains the VAT product posting group of the Interest Account of the Customer Posting Group of the customer this issued finance charge memo line is for.


The program copies the code from the VAT Prod. Posting Group field on the finance charge memo line when the finance charge memo is issued.


If the Type field does not contain G/L Account or Customer Ledger Entry, this field is blank.

fields.name: VAT Identifier
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally. Automatically copies the value from the VAT Identifier field in the VAT Posting Setup window.

fields.name: VAT Clause Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the VAT Clause Code that is associated with the sales line.
After you post a sales document, the VAT Clause Code that is associated with the document is copied to the issued finance charge memo line.

fields.name: System-Created Entry
fields.tooltip:
Contains information about sales quotes, purchase quotes, or orders in earlier versions of the document.
The information is stored when you archive a sales quote, purchase quote, or order. The information is copied from the Sales Header or Purchase Header table.
For more information, see Help for the related field.
